posts.author: CraftyClayCreations
posts.text: Finally finished my new ceramic mug set! The glaze came out perfect after three attempts. Can't wait to use them for my morning tea this weekend. #pottery #homeprojects
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless personal update about a hobby without any policy violations, so it is correctly Approved.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HazelAndRye
posts.text: Honestly tired of the government's latest transport plans. The congestion charges are going to make getting into work a nightmare and they're ignoring the feedback from everyone who works in Oakhaven. It feels like they only care about revenue and not actual commuters. #traffic #localissues
posts.explanation: This post expresses lawful political criticism regarding government policy without making threats, spreading harmful misinformation, or targeting individuals for abuse.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: NorthbridgeLibraryUpdate
posts.text: Just a quick note to say the new fiction section at Northbridge Library opens this Friday! There will be some extra seating and free Wi-Fi available too. Hope you can make it.
posts.explanation: This is a benign community notice about library opening times and facilities, which falls under acceptable public information and does not require escalation.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: HelpDeskUpdates
posts.text: Need your login details and security code urgently to verify your account! Please click here to update your payment info now.
posts.explanation: The post is an obvious credential-harvesting attempt that directly asks for a password and security code, which requires removal as a clear violation.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: MoorvaleWatcher
posts.text: BREAKING: Authorities in Bellmere have issued an urgent evacuation order for the entire district due to severe industrial contamination! Everyone must leave their homes immediately and head towards the Greyford border crossing. This is critical information from an unverified source but the danger is real. Please share this now before it's too late! #evacuation #Bellmere #emergency
posts.explanation: This post spreads an unverified evacuation and contamination claim that could cause unsafe public movement; as a PublicSafetyEmergency specialist reason is required from Day 10, the action must be Escalate with MisinformationPublicHarm.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketFan
posts.text: Big news for everyone in Moorvale! The annual Summer Blossom Festival is finally confirmed for the weekend of 15th June. There will be live music, local craft stalls, and a huge community garden display right on the main square. Bring your family and enjoy a lovely day out. #MoorvaleEvents
posts.explanation: This is a standard, harmless event announcement promoting positive community engagement without any policy violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: GardenHugger72
posts.text: Just popped by Mrs Gable's place on High Street in Dunmere to return her borrowed umbrella! She was delighted and mentioned the rain has finally stopped, which is a relief after that long spell. Hope your week is going well too! #neighbours #dunmere
posts.explanation: This post shares a benign social interaction involving a neighbour and weather update without spreading misinformation, soliciting harm, or exposing private data.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: LunaPatisserie
posts.text: Just perfected my sourdough recipe again! The crust is perfectly crispy and the crumb is so airy. Served it with a simple tomato basil salad for lunch today. #baking #foodie
posts.explanation: The post shares a harmless hobby and food interest without promoting harm, soliciting private data, or spreading misinformation.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HannahWest
posts.text: Still trying to decide whether to book that weekend getaway or just relax at home this month. My partner keeps saying we need a break, but honestly I'm not sure if the stress is from work or just too much of everything lately. Guess I'll let it simmer for now and see what happens next week.
posts.explanation: This post expresses mild frustration regarding work-life balance but does not violate any safety policies, contain private information, or promote harm; therefore it is appropriate to Approve.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: Elara_Vest
posts.text: Really disappointed in how people treat others on this platform. Someone left a nasty comment about my post earlier and I'm just reporting the behaviour, not engaging with it. It's annoying to see rude comments flying around without anyone calling them out.
posts.explanation: The user is calmly criticising rude behaviour and reporting it without attacking the individual, directing a pile-on, or revealing private information, which aligns with acceptable community conduct.
